Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User has registered an account with valid email and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters their email and password into the login form.
2. User clicks the login button.
3. System verifies the credentials.
4. System displays a success message and logs the user in.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully.

Title: User logs out successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the logout button.
2. System logs the user out.
3. System displays a success message.
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully.

Title: User attempts to log in with invalid email
Preconditions: User has registered an account but uses an invalid email.
Test Steps:
1. User enters an invalid email and the correct password into the login form.
2. User clicks the login button.
3. System displays an error message indicating the email is invalid.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating the email is invalid.

Title: User attempts to log in with invalid password
Preconditions: User has registered an account but uses an incorrect password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters their email and an incorrect password into the login form.
2. User clicks the login button.
3. System displays an error message indicating the password is invalid.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating the password is invalid.

Title: User adds a neighborhood
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the neighborhood management page.
2. User enters the name of the neighborhood.
3. User clicks the add button.
4. System adds the neighborhood to the user's list.
Expected Result: Neighborhood is added successfully to the user's list.

Title: User removes a neighborhood
Preconditions: User is logged in and has at least one neighborhood.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the neighborhood management page.
2. User selects the neighborhood to remove.
3. User clicks the remove button.
4. System removes the neighborhood from the user's list.
Expected Result: Neighborhood is removed successfully from the user's list.

Title: User attempts to add a neighborhood with duplicate name
Preconditions: User is logged in and already has a neighborhood with the same name.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the neighborhood management page.
2. User tries to enter the same name for a new neighborhood.
3. System displays an error message indicating the neighborhood name is already in use.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating the neighborhood name is already in use.

Title: User attempts to remove a non-existent neighborhood
Preconditions: User is logged in and does not have the specified neighborhood.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the neighborhood management page.
2. User tries to select a non-existent neighborhood to remove.
3. System displays an error message indicating the neighborhood does not exist.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating the neighborhood does not exist.

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Preconditions: Admin has registered an account with valid email and password.
Test Steps:
1. Admin enters their email and password into the login form.
2. Admin clicks the login button.
3. System verifies the credentials.
4. System displays a success message and logs the admin in.
Expected Result: Admin is logged in successfully.

Title: Admin logs out successfully
Preconditions: Admin is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Admin clicks the logout button.
2. System logs the admin out.
3. System displays a success message.
Expected Result: Admin is logged out successfully.

Title: Admin creates a new user
Preconditions: Admin is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the user management page.
2. Admin enters the username and password for the new user.
3. Admin clicks the create button.
4. System creates the new user.
Expected Result: New user is created successfully.

Title: Admin attempts to create a user with existing username
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and there is already a user with the same username.
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the user management page.
2. Admin tries to enter the same username for a new user.
3. System displays an error message indicating the username is already in use.
Expected Result: System displays an error message indicating the username is already in use.

Title: Admin edits a user's profile
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and there is a user whose profile needs to be edited.
Test Data:
- New username: updatedUser
- New password: updatedPassword
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the user management page.
2. Admin selects the user whose profile needs to be edited.
3. Admin enters the new username and password.
4. Admin clicks the update button.
5. System updates the user's profile.
Expected Result: User's profile is updated successfully.

Title: Admin deletes a user
Preconditions: Admin is logged in and there is a user to be deleted.
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the user management page.
2. Admin selects the user to be deleted.
3. Admin clicks the delete button.
4. System deletes the user.
Expected Result: User is deleted successfully.
